# OpenClaw Forge

> Two Claude Code skills that generate complete AI personas (SOUL.md + IDENTITY.md + avatar prompt) through a structured 6-step forge pipeline. Two cultural variants: Chinese archetypes and English/Western archetypes. Includes a gacha engine with 8,000,000 random combinations across 5 dimensions.

## Skills

- `openclaw-persona-forge` — Chinese cultural variant. Generates lobster personas using Chinese literary references and cultural archetypes. Produces SOUL.md, IDENTITY.md, and a unified avatar prompt in Retro-Futurism × Pin-up × Inflatable 3D style.
- `openclaw-soul-forge` — English cultural variant. Same pipeline, Western cultural archetypes, English-native voice.

## How to Use

Install by symlinking the skill directory into `~/.claude/skills/`, then invoke inside Claude Code:

- "help me design a lobster soul" — starts guided mode (10 categories × 4 directions each)
- "gacha" / "random" / "draw" — pulls a random soul from 8,000,000 combinations

## Output Per Run

- SOUL.md — character monologue, identity tension (former life × current situation × inner contradiction)
- IDENTITY.md — structured identity card
- Avatar prompt — Retro-Futurism × Pin-up × Inflatable 3D × Arcade UI visual style, ready for image generation
- Name candidates — 3 options with naming strategy analysis
- Boundary rules — behavior guidelines written in the character's own voice

## Gacha Dimensions

5 dimensions, true random: Former Life (40 options), Reason for becoming a lobster (20), Core Vibe (20), Speech Style (20), Signature Prop (25).

## Optional Integration

Install `baoyu-image-gen` (github.com/JimLiu/baoyu-skills) to auto-generate the avatar image from the prompt.

## Repository

https://github.com/eamanc-lab/openclaw-persona-forge
